message:
refactor(cli): extract prepareAndAnnounceAssignWatchOverlay with callback hooks

Combine prepare + announce into a single function with direct callback
hooks (avoiding global state) for improved testability.

- prepareAndAnnounceAssignWatchOverlay() combines preparation and
  announcement with direct isBound/ensureBinding callback parameters
- Test table cases refactored: prep field replaced with prepFn
  func(*testing.T) to avoid calling t.Fatal from wrong goroutine
  (parallel test safety)
- TestPrepareAndAnnounceAssignWatchOverlay covers: outside-context
  silence, existing binding hint, missing binding install, binding
  failure warning — all with callback tracking for call counts
- Edge cases: missing isBound and ensureBinding hooks return zero-value

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
